violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized and photo of cleaned ice machine is to be sent to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Menus must disclose which items are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the stand up freezer in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The door on the dishwasher located was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
The facility is lacking drain stoppers for the three bay sink. Establishment must have drain stoppers to properly operate components of three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The ice machine was observed leaking into a pan. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The floor in the kitchen area under the fridge is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025
